tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Velvet smoke behind the mirror
Every step I take gets clearer
Haunted by the ones I've buried
Secrets in the dark I carried

[Pre-Chorus]
Don't look back
The shadows follow anyway

[Chorus]
I move in silence
Through the violence of my mind
Shadow protocol
Leave the broken world behind
I move in silence
No one hears me when I cry
Shadow protocol
I was never here tonight

[Verse 2]
Broken glass and whispered lies
City fades beneath disguise
I don't trust the morning light
I was born to own the night

[Chorus]
I move in silence
Through the violence of my mind
Shadow protocol
Leave the broken world behind
I move in silence
No one hears me when I cry
Shadow protocol
I was never here tonight

[Bridge]
Every scar is just a map
Of all the places I can't go back
But in the dark I find my peace
Where all the noise can finally cease

[Outro]
Shadow protocol
Shadow protocol
I was never here

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Picked up my boots from a dusty shelf
Said goodbye to the doubt I felt
Highway 10 and a tank of faith
Nothin' left but the road and grace

[Pre-Chorus]
Every mile washes something clean
Every sunset's the best I've seen

[Chorus]
Dust and neon, that's all I know
Chase the lightning, let the thunder go
Small town heart with a big world dream
Dust and neon, that's all I need
Dust and neon

[Verse 2]
Honky-tonk with a stranger's song
Three chords deep and I sang along
Cold beer and a summer night
Stars so close I could hold 'em tight

[Pre-Chorus]
Every mile washes something clean
Every sunset's the best I've seen

[Chorus]
Dust and neon, that's all I know
Chase the lightning, let the thunder go
Small town heart with a big world dream
Dust and neon, that's all I need
Dust and neon

[Bridge]
I ain't runnin' from a thing
I'm runnin' toward the life I sing
With the windows down and the radio loud
I found myself when I left that town

[Final Chorus]
Dust and neon, that's all I know
Chase the lightning, let the thunder go
Small town heart with a big world dream
Dust and neon, that's all I need

[Outro]
Dust and neon
Dust and neon
That's all I need

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Alarm at five, no snooze, I'm up
Cold water face, fill the coffee cup
While they sleep I build the dream
Every morning is a new regime
Books on the desk, charts on the screen
I see the life I've never seen

[Pre-Chorus]
They call it crazy, I call it faith
Success don't come to those who wait

[Chorus]
Empire grind, I'm on the clock
Every single day I don't stop
Empire grind, brick by brick
Patience and the hustle make it stick
I'm building something they can't take
Empire grind, make no mistake

[Verse 2]
Failed twice, came back three
Every no just fuel for me
Mentor told me stay the course
Discipline becomes the force
Late nights turn to early flights
Conference calls and city lights

[Chorus]
Empire grind, I'm on the clock
Every single day I don't stop
Empire grind, brick by brick
Patience and the hustle make it stick
I'm building something they can't take
Empire grind, make no mistake

[Bridge]
They don't see the hours I pour
The sacrifices and the war
But when the empire stands up tall
They'll know I gave it all

[Outro]
Empire grind, empire grind
Never stop, never stop

Pages turning, tea grows cold
Stories older than I'm told
Rain is painting on the glass

[Chorus]
Paper and rain
All I need again
Slow the world down
Let the quiet in
Paper and rain
Gentle as a friend
Nothing to fix
Nothing to defend

[Verse 2]
Dog-eared chapters, favorite chair
Bookmarks made from everywhere
Words like blankets, warm and true
Every page leads back to you

[Chorus]
Paper and rain
All I need again
Slow the world down
Let the quiet in
Paper and rain
Gentle as a friend
Nothing to fix
Nothing to defend

[Bridge]
The world is loud enough outside
In here I'm on the gentle side
Of everything that ever was
Just paper, rain, and love because

[Outro]
Paper and rain
Paper and rain
Slow the world down
